title: Fillable Pink Baby Bottles (12cm) 2 Pieces - Unique & Adorable Keepsakes, Perfect for Baby Showers, Gender Reveals, and Party Decorations
features: FILLABLE BABY BOTTLES: Our fillable pink baby bottles are designed with convenience in mind, providing an easy-to-fill option for various baby-related celebrations, such as baby showers and gender reveals.

PINK COLOR: Our pink baby bottles offer versatility in party planning, making them ideal for decorations or favors at events where the gender of the baby is being revealed or celebrated, appealing to both boys and girls.

ADORABLE KEEPSAKES: These fillable pink baby bottles aren't just practical; they also serve as memorable keepsakes for you and your guests, allowing you to cherish your baby's milestones and special moments for years to come.

PERFECT QUANTITY & SIZE: Our fillable pink baby bottles add style and substance to your celebrations with their 12cm height, providing ample space for candies or treats, and include 2 pieces for added value and multiple uses.

PERFECT FOR BABY SHOWERS: Our fillable baby bottles are the ultimate accessory for any baby celebration, giving you a practical solution that will make event unforgettable. Boost your party's ambiance and have guests raving about these unique keepsakes.
description: Product Description Thank all the guests who came to your party and send them home with these party favors featuring pink fillable feeding bottles. Your guests will be thrilled to take home these party favors as a memento of your occasion. Box Contains 1 x 2 5" PINK FILLABLE BABY BOTTLE
